content: May ilang research prototypes at internal tools na gumagamit ng Convergent Schema Normalization para sa multi-tenant Postgres setups, ngunit wala pang widely adopted open-source solution na ganap na nag-a-automate ng tenant-specific schema reconciliation gamit ang deterministic merge algebra sa bawat release cycle. Karaniwan pa rin ang manual o semi-automated na proseso sa production environments.
